guild.name: Wave Improvement Cord! | Loot & Surge Routes & Tips & Tricks

messages.content:
## 1.Understand Storm Circle Behavior ##

* The first circle appears randomly but almost always within the starting safe zone.
* In 60–70% of cases, each subsequent circle shifts toward the center of the previous zone 
* Edge pulls (zones shifting to map edges) are rarely consecutive.

## 2.Pay Attention to Terrain ##
* Ending zones rarely occur on high mountains, deep water, or uneven terrain.
* They more often land in larger flat areas or gentle terrain.

## 3.Center Zone Strategy ##
* The center of the current safe zone has a strong chance of being inside the next circle.
* For placement-based play, position near—but not directly on—the center for flexibility.

## 4.Use Forecasting Items (If Available) #
* If the currrent season includes augments or forecasting items, prioritize securing them to predict storm circles.

## 5.Observe Pro Players ##
* Watching competitive players and tournament rotations gives insight into common zone paths and prediction habits.
